articles.description: Cardano’s (ADA) price reclaimed $0.38 for the first time since August 2, which resulted from an 18% increase in the last seven days. Interestingly, this price increase coincides with a disclosure that could drive ADA holders to sell off some of their holdings. articles.title: Solana jumps 10% to $161 on Powell’s dovish signal
articles.description: Solana’s price climbed to $161 after Fed Chair Powell’s Address in Wyoming, with traders anticipating interest cuts in the coming months.

articles.description: Like many altcoins in the market, Solana’s (SOL) price jumped in the last 24 hours. This is a positive development for the token, which has increased 13% in the last seven days. articles.title: Cardano Delays Chang Hard Fork to September
articles.description: Cardano delays its Chang hard fork to September 1, ensuring full ecosystem readiness, while exploring a potential groundbreaking AI partnership with Algorand.

articles.title: Ethereum Eyes Potential Rally if Price Breaks $2,800 Threshold
articles.description: Ethereum's price could be on the verge of a significant upswing, but analysts suggest a weekly close above $2,800 is crucial to confirm the move.
